aliasReplaced: Roti / Chapati  ->  Roti / Chapati (plain, no oil)

finalItems.name: Whole Truth WPI Whey
finalItems.notes: Verify against your tub — WPI scoop weight varies.

finalItems.name: Curd / Dahi (full fat)
finalItems.notes: Full-fat homemade curd (from whole milk). Corrected to be internally consistent (was 98/70 mismatch). If your curd is richer/strained, calibrate from label. IFCT/USDA-aligned.

finalItems.name: Toor/Arhar Dal (cooked, plain)
finalItems.notes: Plain cooked pigeon-pea dal with light tempering. ~8-10g protein/katori.

finalItems.name: Paratha (plain, pan, moderate oil)
finalItems.notes: Home-style with ~1 tsp oil per paratha. Oil varies — calibrate.

finalItems.name: Roti / Chapati (plain, no oil)
finalItems.notes: Whole wheat, no ghee. IFCT-anchored. If you brush ghee, add it separately.

finalItems.name: White Rice (cooked)
finalItems.notes: Plain boiled white rice. IFCT/USDA standard — reliable.

finalItems.name: Jeera Rice
finalItems.notes: Rice tempered with ghee/oil + cumin. Calibrate ghee.

finalItems.name: Idli
finalItems.notes: ICMR-NIN IFCT 2017: 6.3g protein/100g. Steamed, no oil — reliable.

finalItems.name: Plain Dosa
finalItems.notes: Thin dosa, light oil on tawa. Oil varies.

finalItems.name: Cooking Oil (generic)
finalItems.notes: Any vegetable oil. 9 kcal/g — for the oil-capture feature.

finalItems.name: Paneer Tikka (dry, grilled)
finalItems.notes: Marinated grilled paneer. Less oil than gravies.

finalItems.name: Dal Makhani
finalItems.notes: Butter + cream heavy. HIGHLY variable — calibrate to source.

finalItems.name: Paneer (raw)
finalItems.notes: Full-fat paneer. IFCT/USDA-anchored — reliable. High protein + fat.

finalItems.name: Sprouts (moong, boiled/steamed)
finalItems.notes: Steamed moong sprouts — reliable, high protein.

finalItems.name: Roasted Chana (bhuna)
finalItems.notes: Roasted bengal gram — high protein snack. Reliable.

finalItems.name: Aloo Paratha (stuffed)
finalItems.notes: Potato-stuffed, home-style oil. Calibrate to your kitchen.

finalItems.name: Veg Biryani
finalItems.notes: Restaurant veg biryani, notable oil/ghee. Calibrate.

finalItems.name: Masala Dosa
finalItems.notes: With potato masala, more oil. Calibrate.

finalItems.name: Medu Vada
finalItems.notes: Deep-fried urad dal. High oil absorption — varies.

finalItems.name: Dal Tadka
finalItems.notes: Restaurant dal with ghee tadka. Calibrate ghee.

finalItems.name: Paneer Butter Masala
finalItems.notes: Butter + cream + cashew gravy. HIGH variability — calibrate.

finalItems.name: Malai Kofta
finalItems.notes: Fried kofta + cream gravy. High cal.

finalItems.name: Pani Puri / Gol Gappa (assembled)
finalItems.notes: Puri + potato + water. Per-plate estimate; varies by filling.

finalItems.name: Dahi Puri (assembled)
finalItems.notes: Puri + curd + chutney + sev. Curd/sev vary.

finalItems.name: Sev Puri
finalItems.notes: Puri + chutneys + sev, oil in sev.

finalItems.name: Pav Bhaji
finalItems.notes: Bhaji (butter-heavy) + pav. Per-plate; butter varies a lot.

finalItems.name: Vada Pav
finalItems.notes: Fried vada in pav. Per-piece estimate.

finalItems.name: Poha Chivda / Namkeen
finalItems.notes: Fried namkeen mix — high cal density.

finalItems.name: Whey Protein Isolate (generic scoop)
finalItems.notes: Generic WPI. REPLACE with your Whole Truth WPI label numbers -> mark verified.

finalItems.name: Muesli (fruit & nut)
finalItems.notes: Generic muesli. Check your brand's label.

finalItems.name: Margherita Pizza (veg)
finalItems.notes: Cheese-tomato pizza. Per-slice estimate; toppings vary.

finalItems.name: Maggi / Instant Noodles (prepared)
finalItems.notes: Prepared masala noodles. 1 cake dry ~70g -> ~150g cooked.

finalItems.name: Tofu (firm)
finalItems.notes: Soy tofu. NOTE: soy — flagged for your thyroid protocol. High protein.

finalItems.name: Soya Chunks (cooked)
finalItems.notes: SOY — flagged for thyroid. COOKED/hydrated chunks (dry granules are ~345 kcal/100g). Corrected kcal to match macros. Very high protein. Calibrate to your brand if reintroduced.

finalMeals.name: Roti + Dal + Sabzi (typical thali plate)
finalMeals.notes: 2 rotis + dal + sabzi. Everyday North-Indian plate.

finalMeals.name: Pav Bhaji (full plate)
finalMeals.notes: Already per-plate; kept as meal for convenience.

finalMeals.name: Whey shake in milk
finalMeals.notes: Post-workout. REPLACE whey with your Whole Truth WPI numbers.

finalMeals.name: Greek Yogurt + Whey bowl (your dinner)
finalMeals.notes: Matches your evening yogurt bowl pattern.
